name: deepgram-js-speech-to-text
description: Use when writing or reviewing JavaScript/TypeScript in this repo that calls Deepgram Speech-to-Text v1 (`/v1/listen`) for prerecorded or live audio transcription.
intent_triggers: use the deepgram js speech to text agent skill
run a workflow for deepgram js speech to text
help me with deepgram js speech to text
我需要處理 deepgram js speech to text 相關工作
幫我啟用 deepgram js speech to text 這個 skill
用 agent skill 完成 deepgram js speech to text
use deepgram js speech to text from deepgram-js-sdk

task.description: Natural-language task or instruction for the agent skill.

context_path.description: Optional workspace path or file context for the skill.

examples.intent: Use the deepgram js speech to text skill for this task.

error_codes.1: Skill invocation failed or required context was missing.
